description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of white and light wood finishes. The front face is organized into three horizontal sections: two upper rows of sleek, handle-less drawers or doors, a central open shelf with a wood accent, and a lower section of larger drawers or doors. The left side is partially enclosed by a vertical slatted wood panel, adding a decorative and structural element. The right and rear sides are plain, with smooth white surfaces and no visible hardware. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, white and light wood cabinetry unit with handle-less drawers, an open shelf, and a decorative slatted wood side panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of drawers, open shelf, and the vertical slatted wood panel on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the unit and the vertical slatted wood panel extending above the cabinetry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, smooth white surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a solid, unadorned white panel with no openings or decorative elements.
